items.caption: A collage of three photos showcasing a sewing project. the top photo depicts a living room with a rug that has a drop cloth design. the middle photo shows a person cutting a piece of fabric with a drop cloth pattern. the bottom photo displays a close-up of a sewing project in progress, with a piece of fabric and a needle and thread. the text "canvas drop cloth rug" is overlaid on the top photo, indicating the theme of the sewing project.
